reference: I am thirty-three weeks pregnant and experiencing a stabbing pain in my lower back and lower right side that comes and goes. My back is hurting pretty consistently in the center, but this pain does not remain; however, I cannot walk when it does hit. I am wondering what it might be.
text: I am 33 weeks pregnant and experiencing a stabbing pain in my lower back and lower right side that comes and goes. My back is hurting pretty consistently in the center, but this pain does not remain; however, I cannot walk when it does hit. I am wondering what it might be.
